name: Tuna and Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tuna in water, drained (6 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the defrosted green beans for 2 minutes in boiling water. Drain and plunge into cold water. Drain.
2. Place the cooked potatoes, beans, and tuna in a salad bowl. Mix the anchovies and pesto with the mayonnaise and pour over the salad. Add salt and pepper and toss.
3. Garnish with parsley.
